zh-HK: 咖啡訂閱新增「可換豆」計算模式：可切換固定訂閱／可換豆，並設定換豆週期（月）
可換豆模式下豆款可分配到最多 2 個換豆套餐，各套餐以最貴豆款保守定價；「不列入」改走正常單項計費並計入總額
咖啡訂閱預覽加套餐說明整列；正式 Email 分行列出可選豆款並標示每 N 個月可更換，價格表標題改 Package N
Similar Product Quick Add 改為手動「搵相似／Find similar」按鈕；批量 Quick Entry／單行輸入不再自動逐行掃描相似產品
Product search dropdown 會將跳脫引號還原為正常引號，避免描述多顯示反斜線
Stock Available auto-load 判斷檔案未更新時會確實復用用戶 stock cache，並將 stock-only item 加入產品搜尋
en: Coffee subscription adds Flexible Bean Rotation: switch Fixed vs Rotate and set bean-change cycle (months)
In rotate mode, beans can be assigned to up to 2 packages priced at the most expensive bean; Excluded beans stay as normal line items in the total
Coffee preview shows a package description row; formal email lists selectable beans with change-every-N-mo note and Package N pricing headers
Similar Product Quick Add is now manual via Find similar; bulk Quick Entry / single-row input no longer auto-scans similar products
Product search dropdown normalizes escaped quotes so descriptions show proper quotation marks
Stock Available auto-load reuses saved user stock cache when the file is unchanged, and stock-only items remain searchable
